name: rootloom
description: Reliable Codex engineering, woven from project truth to verified delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable Codex engineering, woven from the roots up.
interface.longDescription: Rootloom weaves repository guidance, reusable workflows, command Rules, model-routed agents, lifecycle audits, and deterministic delivery gates into five selectable capability layers. Teams can start with Skills only, choose the single-agent engineering default, or explicitly opt into controlled delegation and high assurance.
defaultPrompt: Choose and set up the right Rootloom capability layer safely.
Seed and refine AGENTS.md guidance for this repository.
Run a controlled high-assurance coding change.
